injuries.headline: Duke likely without Patrick Ngongba for NCAA tournament opener
injuries.description: Duke will open the NCAA tournament Thursday without big man Patrick Ngongba, who continues to recover from a foot injury, putting some added pressure on star freshman Cameron Boozer.

injuries.headline: Louisville to be without star freshman Mikel Brown against USF
injuries.description: Louisville star freshman Mikel Brown Jr. is out for the Cardinals' first-round game against South Florida, the school announced Wednesday.
